signin.label: Customer access
signin.heroDescription: Sign in to manage your profile and keep your details ready for future Davinto experiences.
signin.title: Sign in
signin.description: Use the email and password connected to your customer account.
signin.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signin.error: Could not sign in. Please try again.
signin.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signup.label: Customer membership
signup.heroDescription: Create your profile and keep your details ready for account-connected checkout and order history.
signup.title: Create account
signup.description: Your customer account stays separate from guest order tracking.
signup.name: Name
signup.nameLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
signup.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.error: Could not create your account. Please try again.
signup.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
